Current Control State: Continuous automated network scans are performed on Corporate IT only.
Identified Gap: Critical Digital Assets (CDAs) in the plant control network are missing structured vulnerability baseline reporting.
Remediation Action Plan: Implement Tenable OT Security via passive monitoring to inventory and baseline all CDAs without disrupting active plant instrumentation.

Current Control State: Vendors submit self-attested custom questionnaires before tool integration.
Identified Gap: Lack of validation for vendor software supply chains; no verification of SBOMs (Software Bill of Materials).
Remediation Action Plan: Mandate full SBOM ingestion via dependency scanners during third-party tool assessments; verify software provenance prior to code execution.

Current Control State: Disaster recovery playbooks exist but are updated annually on paper.
Identified Gap: BCDR playbooks lack active tabletop simulation validations for ransomware targeting industrial plant telemetry networks.
Remediation Action Plan: Coordinate multi-departmental tabletop threat simulations mimicking simulated system lockouts to calculate and confirm true operational RTO/RPO metrics.
